rationale: No qualitative change in Ukraine war or energy markets; Iran deal remains unresolved with Trump's claims contradicted by Tehran, keeping mild uncertainty in global energy outlook relevant to Poland.

top_events.title: Tehran contradicts Trump on Iran deal progress
top_events.summary: Iran says nothing is finalized despite Trump's claims, keeping oil market uncertainty alive. For Poland, unresolved Iran diplomacy means no relief on global energy prices.

top_events.title: Ukraine-Russia cross-border attacks continue
top_events.summary: Three killed in ongoing exchange of strikes — no qualitative escalation, war continues as background reality for Poland's eastern border security calculus.

top_events.title: India-Pakistan conflict deadliest battle zone coverage
top_events.summary: Ongoing India-Pakistan tensions reported but geographically distant with no direct impact on Poland's security or economy.
